# Live User Samples Fixtures

This directory contains user-script manifests for live/manual acceptance flows. The manifests are small and may be committed. Large reference images and all generated outputs should stay outside git unless the user explicitly approves committing small reference images.

Round 04 standard paths:

```text
tests/fixtures/live_user_samples/round04/<case_id>/
local_inputs/round04_live_user_samples/<case_id>/
outputs/runs/round04_live_user_samples/<case_id>/
```
